module.name: src
module.purpose: Second-generation Rust source organized into client, agent, and common modules with resolved typed configuration, serializable chat message envelopes, centralized external-library namespaces, remoc-backed session and task endpoints, loop engine API draft, design-ignored integration tests, and model request backend implementation.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client-facing draft split into CLI and a remoc-backed core client session endpoint.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent loop engine interface with backend type selection, remoc-backed frontdoor session endpoint, public model request interface, Deepseek backend implementation, and future retrieval/tool interfaces.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared interfaces used across the second-generation source tree, including typed TOML configuration, chat user messages, shared channel errors, remoc session protocol messages, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.
